name: Onstage Entertainment
location: Brisbane, QLD (Enoggera QLD noted on Facebook)
contact: team@onstage.com.au | Individual staff: melanie@onstage.com.au (GM), kurt@onstage.com.au (CFO), keeley@onstage.com.au (Entertainment & Programming Manager, now left Jan 2026) | Online contact form on website
commission_model: Booking fee added on top; agency claims their buying power means total cost is often same or less than dealing directly with performer. Describes itself as a 'wholesaler of talent'.
roster_size: Large network; not publicly stated. Supplies bands, DJs, MCs, comedians, guest speakers, feature shows, aerial acts, dancers, roving performers, classical ensembles.
notes: 40+ years in business. One of Australia's most established full-service entertainment agencies. Keeley Duggan was Entertainment & Programming Manager 2023–Jan 2026 (now at AFL). Key clients include Brisbane Convention & Exhibition Centre (since 1995), Pharmacy Guild of Australia, BOQ. Ensures all performers carry public liability insurance. Active Instagram @onstage.entertainment. ABIA 2025 QLD finalist: Entertainment Agent.

name: Brisbane Bands (brisbanebands.com.au)
location: Lutwyche, Brisbane, QLD (PO Box 108, Lutwyche QLD 4030)
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Acts are priced inclusive of agency fee.
roster_size: 157+ cover bands, 208+ wedding singers, 132+ pub bands listed — one of Brisbane's largest online entertainment directories, 2+ decades in operation.
notes: Also operates brisbanecoverbands.com.au (same phone/contact). Extremely large roster covering every format: soloists, duos, trios, cover bands, wedding singers, pub bands, jazz, tribute acts. Primarily serves Brisbane and SEQ. Long-established agency (20+ years). Both sites use same contact details.

name: Brisbane Bands For Hire (bandstoyou.com.au / brisbanebandsforhire.com.au)
location: Brisbane, QLD (serving Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast and surrounds)
contact: Online quote form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Bands to You is a marketplace-style platform; quotes requested directly, deposit paid securely through site.
roster_size: 80+ cover bands listed on Bands To You Brisbane page alone. Claims 'largest selection of cover bands in Brisbane'.
notes: 25+ years in the industry. Two interlinked sites (brisbanebandsforhire.com.au and bandstoyou.com.au appear to be the same agency). Roster listed anonymously by number (Band 389, Band 172, etc.) to protect exclusivity. Strong focus on cover bands for weddings, corporate events, birthdays. Agents are current/former professional musicians.

name: Bris Bands Agency (brisbandsagency.com.au)
location: South East Queensland
contact: Online enquiry form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Performers offered free profile; agency takes fee from bookings.
roster_size: Not stated. Offers soloists, duos, trios, bands, children's entertainers, keynote speakers.
notes: Newer, smaller boutique agency. 7 days a week operation. Handles all coordination including day-of management. All performers are trained in prevention/infection control, carry professional insurance, equipment safety tested/tagged. Targets weddings, corporate events, conferences, festivals, private parties.

name: Rooster Entertainment
location: Brisbane, QLD
contact: Online contact/enquiry form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
roster_size: Not stated.
notes: Established 2006. Covers venues, corporate/private functions, events, and weddings. Goal is to match right artist to venue and patrons. Low online profile but established agency.

name: McGee Entertainment Group
location: Palm Beach, QLD 4221 (Gold Coast/Brisbane border)
contact: Phone: 1300 07 06 71 | Email: bookings@mcgeeentertainment.com.au
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Fixed-package pricing for wedding events.
roster_size: Not publicly stated. Has named sub-brands (McGee Strings for string quartets, Malibu Crew for poolside DJ/sax). In-house collective of musicians.
notes: ABIA 2025 QLD finalist: Entertainment Agent & Live Wedding Singers. Described as Brisbane & Gold Coast #1 for Wedding & Corporate Entertainment. Services Brisbane, Gold Coast, Byron Bay, Sunshine Coast, Airlie Beach, Hamilton Island, Whitsundays, Sydney. Strong corporate and wedding focus. Very polished website; Instagram active. Travel worldwide for destination events.

name: Black Tie Group
location: Queensland (Sunshine Coast & Gold Coast offices)
contact: Phone: 1300 091 311 | Hours: Mon–Sun 10am–6pm | Online quote form
roster_size: Large roster; not stated. Covers soloists, duos, cover bands, jazz bands, tribute bands, DJs, karaoke, string quartets, trivia hosts.
notes: Multi-region agency with dedicated Sunshine Coast, Gold Coast, and Brisbane band sections. Agents are current/former professional musicians who understand event logistics. Strong online presence; lets clients listen to acts before booking. Also services Toowoomba and Australia-wide. All event types from weddings to funerals.

name: Mivida Events & Entertainment
location: Brisbane, QLD (also Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Sydney, Melbourne, Adelaide)
contact: Phone: 0410 042 685 | Contact form on website
roster_size: Not stated. Wide range: bands, DJs, Brazilian/Latin dancers, circus acts, fire performers, roving entertainment.
notes: Founded 2015. Latin/Brazilian entertainment specialist but also books live bands, DJs, and broader entertainment. Services corporate, weddings, venues, pubs, bars, restaurants, festivals. One of the few agencies in SEQ with strong Latin/specialty focus. Good online presence.

name: Velvet Rope Entertainment
location: Gold Coast & Brisbane, QLD
contact: Contact form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
roster_size: In-house performance company with music agency, photo booth, and event brand.
notes: Boutique, high-end agency positioning. Focus on polished, tailored packages for large corporate gatherings and intimate celebrations. Has an in-house performance company so some acts are proprietary. Gold Coast and Brisbane primarily.

name: Hive Entertainment Agency
location: Brisbane, QLD
contact: Contact form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
roster_size: Not stated. Boutique agency — acoustic acts and DJs.
notes: Boutique agency founded by Brisbane couple Emily Rose and Jayden Reid. Specialises in acoustic and DJ entertainment for weddings, corporate events, private parties. Services Queensland and Melbourne (east coast). Small and curated roster.

name: Alan Casey Entertainment Agency
location: Brisbane, QLD (Australia-wide: Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Toowoomba, Ipswich, North Coast NSW and beyond)
contact: Phone: 1300 666 286 | International: +61 422 434 014 | Facebook: AlanCaseyEntertainmentAgency | Email via website contact form
roster_size: Very large. Supplies bands, DJs, MCs, celebrities, speakers, comedians, hypnotists, magicians, tribute acts, dancers, amusement rides, carnival acts, and much more.
notes: One of Queensland's most comprehensive full-service entertainment agencies. Extremely broad scope covering live music through to rides and amusements. Long-established. Serves all SEQ including Toowoomba and Ipswich. Strong for corporate events, themed events, school formals, festivals. Some listings appear dated.

name: WBC Entertainment
location: Brisbane, QLD (services Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast and national)
contact: Phone: 0418 110 878 | Meetings by appointment with Ben | Contact form on website
roster_size: Not stated. Hand-picked roster of live bands, acoustic acts, DJs.
notes: Run by 'Ben'. Boutique premium agency focused on weddings and corporate events. Strong positioning around tailored recommendations. Also supplies Melbourne, Sydney, Perth and other cities. Recommend booking 9–12 months ahead for weddings in peak season (September–May).

name: Catch Live
location: Gold Coast, QLD (serves Gold Coast, Brisbane and surrounds)
contact: Email: connor@catchmanagement.com | Booking enquiry form on website
roster_size: Named roster of ~25+ acts listed on website including named solo artists, duos, and bands.
notes: Part of Catch Management (established 2015, initially focused on EDM). Catch Live is the live music arm. Has venue partnerships (e.g. Juju Mermaid Beach). Focuses on corporate, wedding, private party bookings. Roster includes named artists (not anonymous). Instagram: @catchlive.au.

name: The Famos & Co
location: Peregian Beach (Noosa), QLD (serves Sunshine Coast, Brisbane, Gold Coast, Byron Bay, Toowoomba)
contact: Contact form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Package-based pricing from DJ-only to full live music.
roster_size: Boutique; curated selection of acoustic soloists, duos, and DJs/MCs.
notes: ABIA 2025 QLD finalist: DJ and Live Wedding Singers. Described as 'Queensland's premier wedding music entertainment agency' on Queensland.com. Rated 5.0 (12 reviews) on Easy Weddings. Avg price ~$2,500. Noosa-based, strong throughout Sunshine Coast and broader SEQ. Focuses exclusively on weddings. Covers whole day: ceremony, cocktail, reception, DJ. Strong reputation.

name: Ivella Entertainment
location: Brisbane, QLD (services Brisbane, Sunshine Coast, Gold Coast, Toowoomba — all SEQ)
contact: Email: contact@ivella.com.au | Contact form on website
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Fixed price DJ package: $1,390 full-day (ceremony + cocktail + reception, unlimited consultation).
roster_size: Boutique. Core offering is DJ services plus optional add-on live musicians.
notes: Specialises in wedding DJ experiences with custom music and immersive lighting. Also offers singers, soloists, bands, and tribute acts as add-ons. All SEQ coverage. Pricing transparent on squarespace service page. Books early recommended due to high demand.

name: Explosive Entertainment
location: Gold Coast, QLD (serves Gold Coast, Brisbane, Sunshine Coast, Northern NSW)
contact: Phone: +61 417 232 606 | Online booking form on website
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Published DJ package pricing: Cinderella Package from $895 ($250/hr thereafter).
roster_size: DJ-focused agency. Not a band/covers agency.
notes: 22+ years experience. 10,000+ events. ABIA 2024 No.3 National Entertainment Agent. 2023 QLD Finalist MC and Entertainment Agent. 5,000+ weddings, 500+ corporate events. High-end professional DJ and MC services. Reviewed very positively. Strong Gold Coast presence.

name: Janda Events
location: Currumbin Waters, Gold Coast, QLD (serves Gold Coast, Tweed Heads, Brisbane, Byron Bay)
contact: Contact form on website. Online booking via website.
roster_size: Boutique collective. Celebrants (Jake & Lei), musicians (soloists, duos), DJs, wedding bands.
notes: ABIA 2025 QLD finalist: Entertainment Agent, DJ, and Live Wedding Singers. Multi-award winning. Family-run business and 'collective of good humans'. Can cover entire wedding: celebrant, ceremony music, reception band, DJ. Strong personality-led brand. Highly reviewed.

name: The Gig Factory
location: PO Box 444, Seaforth NSW 2095 (Queensland operations: Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, regional QLD)
contact: Phone: +61 7 3423 1899 | Contact form on website
roster_size: 30+ named featured acts on website. Roster includes cover bands, tribute bands, original touring artists.
notes: Since 2002 (25+ years). One of Australia's longest-running live music booking agencies. Strong pub/venue focus but also corporate and private events. Services Queensland (Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, regional QLD) plus NSW and ACT. Features current gig listings for upcoming shows (e.g. Beechmont Hotel, Sanctuary Cove Tavern). Strong for touring acts and tribute shows.

name: Mood Music Musicians
location: Brisbane, QLD (services Brisbane and South East Queensland)
contact: Contact Kathy directly via online forms on website. Phone contact encouraged ('please call').
commission_model: Direct booking with musicians — no agent middleman. Deposit via internet banking or PayPal; balance due week prior to event.
roster_size: Small collective run by Musical Director Kathy Sander. Includes Amica Jazz Duo, Mood Music Gatsby Band, Mood Music Band, The Mood Music Orchestra, Piano Duo & Trio. Network of additional colleagues.
notes: Not technically an agency — a self-described collective. 'Deal with the Musicians Directly.' Specialises in classical, jazz, Latin, contemporary styles for corporate events, weddings, and private parties. Kathy Sander is one of Queensland's finest professional pianists. All musicians verified via Blue Cards/Police Checks. 50+ reviews on Womo. Rated on Easy Weddings as 'Queensland's leading live music collective'.

name: Coastal Beats
location: Noosa, QLD (also services Gold Coast, Brisbane, Byron Bay)
contact: Phone: 0474 498 929 | Contact form on website
roster_size: Small team. Primarily DJs with live musicians as add-on. Also offers photography, videography, photo booth.
notes: Noosa and Sunshine Coast specialists. Books DJs, live musicians (soloists, duos, trios, up to full corporate entertainment bands). Also provides corporate band with vocals, guitar, bass, keyboards, saxophone, trumpets, percussion. Strong corporate event focus in Noosa area. Works at Noosa Boathouse, Noosa Reef Hotel, Peppers Noosa Resort, Mantra Mooloolaba.

name: BTB Agency (Brisbane Tribute Bands)
location: Brisbane, QLD (also Gold Coast and surrounding SEQ districts)
contact: Contact form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
roster_size: 6,400+ Meetup group members. Focused on tribute and premium cover bands.
notes: Evolved from a Brisbane Meetup group ('Brissy Tribute Bands'). Organises Saturday night live music events in Brisbane, Gold Coast, and surrounding districts. Has run three live music festivals. Strong community following. More event/promotion focused than traditional booking agency — but books and promotes tribute and cover acts for venues.

name: Apples & Pears Entertainment
location: Australia-wide (offices across Australasia; services Queensland among others)
contact: Contact form on website. No direct phone/email publicly listed.
commission_model: Not publicly stated. Transparent, ethical model — introduces clients directly to talent.
roster_size: 1,500+ professional talent in catalogue. Represents hundreds of artists for corporate events.
notes: Premium full-service talent agency. Specialises in celebrity talent, entertainers, speakers, and professional artists for corporate and major events. 20+ years experience. Direct relationships with talent and management — 'single degree of separation'. Background in Recording Industry (iSPY Records), Music Publishing (Elephant Music), Television and Media. High-end focus, not primarily covers/function bands.

name: The Play Agency
location: NSW head office (Suite 179, 202 Victoria Rd, Drummoyne NSW 2047) — services Queensland
contact: Email: info@theplayagency.com | Phone: +61 425 173 229
roster_size: 400 entertainment offerings across 30 categories. Claims most extensive roster in Australia.
notes: Founded by Krystie. Services NSW, VIC, and QLD. 40+ years combined knowledge. Covers corporate events, weddings, product launches, brand activations, private events. Strong non-music entertainment also (acrobatics, interactive). Queensland coverage for Brisbane and Gold Coast events. High-end positioning.

name: CrowdPleaser
location: Australia-wide marketplace (serves SEQ extensively)
contact: Booking guarantee and payment through platform. No direct phone/email listed publicly.
commission_model: Marketplace model — performers message clients directly, no agency middleman. Platform takes booking deposit for security. Booking Guarantee covers clients.
roster_size: Marketplace with hundreds of acts Australia-wide including strong QLD listings.
notes: Australia's marketplace for entertainers. Covers bands, musicians, entertainers, speakers, children's entertainment. Clients search, compare quotes, and book directly with performers. No middleman fees for direct comms. Performers get free profiles, manage bookings and payments in one place. Covers Gold Coast, Brisbane, Sunshine Coast and all SEQ. Good for budget-conscious clients.

name: Surreal (formerly Muso)
location: Australia-wide platform (900+ venues across AUS, UK & NZ)
contact: Platform sign-up at surreal.live
commission_model: Platform fee taken only when gig is booked through the app. Free to register for both sides. Does not take commission on pre-existing relationships.
roster_size: 900+ venue partners Australia-wide. Marketplace connecting musicians with venues.
notes: Rebranded from 'Muso'. Next-generation booking platform primarily connecting musicians with venues (pubs, bars, clubs) for regular gigs. Used by Unified Music Group investors. Handles payment on artists' behalf, automated invoicing, compliance. Venue minimum booking of AUD $75/hour. Primarily for pub/bar/venue regular programming rather than weddings/corporate. Strong Brisbane and Queensland venue presence.

name: SEQ Entertainment
location: South East Queensland
contact: Contact form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
roster_size: DJ-focused. Not stated.
notes: DJ-specialist company (not primarily a band agency). 10+ years experience. Has worked with NRL, Red Bull, major radio stations. Weddings, corporate gatherings, private parties. All SEQ coverage. Strong production (sound systems, lighting).

name: Entertainment Co.
location: Sunshine Coast, QLD (serves Sunshine Coast, Brisbane)
contact: Contact form on website. No phone/email publicly listed.
roster_size: 20+ wedding DJs (hand-picked). Also offers singers, duos, DJ sax, acoustic soloists, DJ singers, DJ band combos.
notes: Sunshine Coast-based, primarily focused on weddings and events. Strong DJ offering with live music add-ons. All DJs hand-picked by team experts. Also services Brisbane. Testimonials from Gloria and Rob.

location: Brisbane, QLD (South East Queensland focus)
contact: Contact form on website (site blocked from direct scraping).
roster_size: Not publicly stated.
notes: Described as: 'For all your live music needs in South East Queensland. Everything from multi-band gigs and acoustic sessions to private functions and river cruises.' Appears to specialise in pub/venue programming as well as private functions. Low online profile but active.

name: Australian Network Entertainment
location: PO Box 143, Avalon Beach NSW 2107 (Australia-wide, including Queensland)

notes: 20+ years experience. Corporate and special event specialists. Supplies cover bands, celebrity artists, comedians, MC's, tribute shows, novelty acts. Books Vegas Please (Brisbane corporate band) among others. Australia-wide operations including Queensland. High-end corporate focus.

name: Between The Covers
location: Queensland (operates in QLD and Victoria)
contact: Contact form on website.

notes: ABIA 2025 QLD finalist in three categories: Entertainment Agent, DJ, and Live Wedding Band — the only act/agency to be a finalist in all three simultaneously. Award-winning cover band and musicians. Active on ABIA Brisbane listings. Strong wedding reputation. Led by musician & performer Becky Rhodes.

name: Envy Event Group
location: Perth, WA (primary); also services Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast
contact: Phone: 0415 783 268 | Contact form on website | Easy Weddings profile
roster_size: Boutique. DJs (Josh, Harley), musicians, event hosts. Also offers photo booths, dance floors, sparkulars, dancing on clouds, mood lighting.
notes: Founded by Adam Warbrick (Managing Director), Eden Dearlove (marketing/DJ), and Leighton Keepa (musician). Boutique wedding entertainment speciality. Growing nationally. Rated 5.0 (61 reviews) on Easy Weddings — services Brisbane, Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Northern NSW plus Perth. Described on Easy Weddings as 'one of Australia's #1 Boutique Wedding Entertainment Companies'.

notes: Local Brisbane/Ipswich company. 215+ events managed across South East Queensland. Offers DJ, photography, videography, and live music services. Smaller boutique operator focused on affordability. Good for local Ipswich/Ipswich surrounds market.
